mapper.sql: select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, d.hospital_id, d.warehouse_name, d.order_id, d.order_no, d.zs_order_id, d.ref_order_source, d.supplier_id, d.delivery_amount, d.delivery_status, d.delivery_person, d.delivery_address, d.expected_delivery_date, d.invoice_no, d.invoice_amount, d.invoice_date, d.order_date, d.audit_status, d.audit_by, d.audit_time, d.audit_remark, d.remark, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, s.company_name as supplier_name from scm_delivery d left join scm_hospital h on d.hospital_id = h.hospital_id left join scm_supplier s on d.supplier_id = s.supplier_id

from scm_order_detail od inner join scm_delivery_detail dd on ( dd.order_detail_id = od.detail_id or exists ( select 1 from scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r0 where r0.order_detail_id = cast(od.detail_id as char) and r0.delivery_detail_id = cast(dd.detail_id as char) ) ) and (dd.del_flag is null or dd.del_flag = '' or dd.del_flag = '0') inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0')
mapper.select:
select cast(od.detail_id as char) as line_key, sum(case when d.audit_status = '1' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as audited_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status is null or d.audit_status = '0' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as pending_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status = '2' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as rejected_qty
where od.order_id = #{orderId} group by od.detail_id
mapper.sql: from zs_tp_order_detail l inner join scm_delivery_detail dd on ( dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id or exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r0 where r0.order_detail_id = l.id and r0.delivery_detail_id = cast(dd.detail_id as char) collate utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci ) ) and (dd.del_flag is null or dd.del_flag = '' or dd.del_flag = '0') inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0')
mapper.select:
select l.id as line_key, sum(case when d.audit_status = '1' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as audited_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status is null or d.audit_status = '0' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as pending_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status = '2' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as rejected_qty
where l.order_id = #{zsOrderId} and (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0') group by l.id

select l.id as line_key, sum(case when d.audit_status = '1' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as audited_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status is null or d.audit_status = '0' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as pending_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status = '2' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as rejected_qty
where l.order_id = #{zsOrderId} and (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0')
and d.delivery_id != #{excludeDeliveryId}
group by l.id

where (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '' or d.del_flag = '0') and ( d.order_id = #{orderId} or exists ( select 1 from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_order_detail od on od.detail_id = dd.order_detail_id where dd.delivery_id = d.delivery_id and od.order_id = #{orderId} and (dd.del_flag is null or dd.del_flag = '' or dd.del_flag = '0') ) or exists ( select 1 from scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r where r.order_id = cast(#{orderId} as char) and r.delivery_id = cast(d.delivery_id as char) ) ) order by d.create_time desc

select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, dd.detail_id as delivery_detail_id, d.audit_status, d.delivery_status, dd.delivery_quantity from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where (dd.del_flag is null or dd.del_flag = '' or dd.del_flag = '0') and ( dd.order_detail_id = #{orderDetailId} or exists ( select 1 from scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r where r.order_detail_id = cast(#{orderDetailId} as char) and r.delivery_detail_id = cast(dd.detail_id as char) ) ) order by d.create_time desc, dd.detail_id

select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, dd.detail_id as delivery_detail_id, d.audit_status, d.delivery_status, dd.delivery_quantity from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where (dd.del_flag is null or dd.del_flag = '' or dd.del_flag = '0') and ( dd.zs_order_detail_id = #{zsOrderDetailId} or exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r where r.order_detail_id = #{zsOrderDetailId} and r.delivery_detail_id = cast(dd.detail_id as char) ) ) order by d.create_time desc, dd.detail_id
